name: Ski Patrol
short_description: Immerse yourself in a massive open-world ski resort while tackling objectives such as rescuing injured skiers, mitigating avalanche hazards, and finding hidden locations. Use realistic ski techniques such as parallel turns and hockey stops to navigate freely through the rugged mountain wilderness.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a massive open-world ski resort like never before in Ski Patrol! With stunning landscapes created using real-world elevation data, Ski Patrol is the ultimate skiing experience for thrill-seekers and explorers alike.


Dynamic Open World

Ski across vast mountains, tackling objectives such as rescuing injured skiers, mitigating avalanche hazards, discovering hidden huts, and tracking down trail markers to learn about your surroundings.


Total Freedom

Whether you're completing objectives or just throwing yourself off cliffs for the adrenaline rush, the choice is yours. Every nook and cranny has something new to uncover, and it all starts with a ride up the lift.


Realistic Ski Physics

Control your skis with precision using your mouse. Learn to carve turns, perform hockey stops, or just bomb straight down the slope. How you ski is up to you!


Progression System

Earn cash by completing goals and use it to unlock new maps, expanding your adventure to fresh, breathtaking locations.
